services.name: Storage Account
services.description: Blob storage for document uploads and long-term retention of originals and processed artifacts

services.name: Azure Event Grid
services.description: Emits events when new documents land in Blob Storage to trigger processing

services.name: Azure Functions
services.description: Orchestrates OCR, summarization, persistence, and search indexing workflows

services.name: Document Intelligence
services.description: Performs OCR and document extraction to produce structured text and fields

services.name: Azure OpenAI
services.description: Generates summaries and enrichments from extracted document text

services.name: Azure Cognitive Search
services.description: Indexes document content and metadata for full-text search and retrieval

services.name: Azure Cosmos DB
services.description: Stores document metadata, processing status, summaries, and index pointers

services.name: Microsoft Entra ID
services.description: Issues identities/tokens and supports validation for secured pipeline operations

services.name: Key Vault
services.description: Stores secrets/keys (e.g., service credentials, connection strings) used by the orchestrator

services.name: Azure Monitor
services.description: Central collection point for application metrics and logs from the primary compute service

services.name: Log Analytics
services.description: Stores and queries centralized logs and traces for investigations and alerting

connections.label: Publish BlobCreated event when a new document is uploaded
Trigger document-processing function on new document arrival
Download original document and persist extracted text/summaries as artifacts
Submit document for OCR/extraction and retrieve structured text/fields
Send extracted text for summarization and enrichment generation
Upsert metadata, processing status, extracted fields, and generated summary
Push content + metadata to indexing pipeline and request index update
Fetch blob content (or processed artifacts) as a search data source for indexing
Read secrets/keys required to call AI services and data stores
Validate access tokens for protected processing and administrative operations
Emit application logs, custom metrics, and dependency traces
Ingest collected logs/metrics for query, alerting, and retention

workflow.description: A document is uploaded to Blob Storage for retention and downstream processing.
Blob Storage emits a creation event and Event Grid delivers it to the orchestrator.
Azure Functions downloads the document and submits it to Document Intelligence for OCR/extraction.
Azure Functions sends extracted text to Azure OpenAI to generate a concise summary and enrichments.
Azure Functions persists metadata, extracted fields, and summaries to Cosmos DB for tracking and retrieval.
Azure Functions updates Azure Cognitive Search with content/metadata; Search can also read blob artifacts for indexing.
Operational visibility is captured via Azure Monitor and stored in Log Analytics for querying and alerts.

metadata.prompt: An intelligent document processing pipeline with Azure AI Document Intelligence for OCR, Azure OpenAI for summarization, Cognitive Search for indexing, Cosmos DB for metadata, and Blob Storage for document retention
